item.title: Ctf
item.description: This is the list of writeups from various CTFs i played.

item.title: About
item.description: Hi, i’m a programmer working mostly with c, cpp, python, go and other tools and toys. I’m playing CTFs, and hosting one at BalCCon.

item.title: Smasher HTB (50pts)
item.description: Smasher Friend of mine suggested me this box as a good “inspiration” for a task for our upcomming CTF at BalCCon congress. I was immediately hooked by the idea of setting a web challenge as entry gate for a binary exploitation challenge where target is web server. That twist gives it a little bit of ‘real world’ feeling ( not really), and a better path for libc ‘leaking’, unlike ususal ‘here you go, download libc from here’ way.
